approve_date.text: วันที่อนุมัติ

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) AS mem_name , sc_mem_m_application_form.sex, sc_mem_m_app_work_info.position_long, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.pre_group_name, sc_mem_m_app_share.share_monthly, sc_mem_m_app_work_info.salary_amount, sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position.description, sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.application_fee , sc_mem_m_app_work_info.position_long, sc_mem_m_application_form.approve_date, sc_mem_m_application_form.hum_id, sc_mem_m_ucf_salary_level.level_name,
sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position.group_position FROM sc_mem_m_application_form , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_app_share, sc_mem_m_app_work_info, sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position, sc_mem_m_ucf_salary_level WHERE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no AND sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no =sc_mem_m_application_form.member_group_no AND sc_mem_m_app_share.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no AND sc_mem_m_app_work_info.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no AND sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.appl_type_code =sc_mem_m_application_form.appl_type_code AND sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position.group_position =sc_mem_m_app_work_info.group_position AND sc_mem_m_ucf_salary_level.level_code = sc_mem_m_app_work_info.salary_rate_code /*WHERE*/
